idea.title: Noob Run
idea.hook: Tap to jump, double-jump and slam the blocky Noob past lava, spikes and saws. How far can you run?
idea.hook_ru: Тапай: прыгай, делай двойной прыжок и ныряй, проводя Ноуба мимо лавы, шипов и пил. Как далеко убежишь?
idea.prototype: Side-scroll auto-runner in PORTRAIT. ONE thumb: TAP = jump, tap-in-air = double-jump, HOLD / swipe-down = fast-drop (slam). The blocky Noob cube runs over ground blocks with PITS; dodge blocky hazards introduced on a distance ladder (gaps -> spikes -> saws -> swing axes -> crushers -> combos). Collect emeralds for an in-run x1..x5 score multiplier (chain pickups + near-misses; hard miss resets). Speed + density ramp; colour zones recolour the world every 280m. One life, instant tap-to-retry (<1s). Persisted best distance + lifetime emerald counter only (NO cross-session meta). Lose = touch any hazard or fall into a pit.
idea.non_timer_pressure: escalating forward speed + obstacle density + the constant pit/lava fall threat
idea.lose_condition: Noob AABB overlaps a hazard or falls below the ground line (gs='GAMEOVER')
idea.why_novel: First voxel/blocky 'Noob' obby-parkour runner in the portfolio; targets the trending obby / parkour / brainrot / block shelf on Yandex where we have zero games; one-thumb jump/double-jump/fast-drop control with a greed-driven emerald multiplier as the score hook.

ten_min_loop: Time-to-first-fun <15s (runner moves from frame 1, first gap by ~3s, demo-hand shows the jump). Escalation on density AND new content: gaps-only -> +spikes(120m) -> +saws(240m) -> +swing axes(380m) -> +crushers(540m) -> full combos(700m); zones recolour every 280m. In-session arc = distance metres + zone colours + rising x1..x5 emerald multiplier; instant tap-to-retry pulls the player straight back.

sources.title: Obby / parkour / brainrot / block theme trending
sources.snippet: Live radar shows obby / parkour / brainrot / block games trending hard on Yandex; portfolio has zero games on this shelf -> fresh CTR opportunity. Noob-vs-Pro framing is a proven clickable angle.

sources.title: Flip Dash / Daily Dodge — one-tap reflex runners retain
sources.snippet: One-tap reflex auto-runners are a proven engagement family in the portfolio; Noob Run extends it with jump/double-jump/fast-drop + an emerald multiplier and a fresh voxel obby theme.

alternatives.title: Vertical Noob climb
alternatives.angle: vertical-ascent parkour climber (ledge to ledge upward) instead of side-scroll.
alternatives.why_not_built: side-scroll auto-runner reads 'go far' more instantly in 5s and makes the jump/double-jump/fast-drop verb set clearer for one thumb; kept as the primary.

alternatives.title: Lane-swap obby
alternatives.angle: 3-lane swipe dodger themed as an obby.
alternatives.why_not_built: swipe lanes is a second input axis and overlaps existing lane-runner space; the one-tap jump thesis is cleaner and more novel for us.
